scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const src='lwjgl3/build/libs/java gamedevelopment-1.0.0.jar'; const dest='public/downloads/java gamedevelopment-1.0.0.jar'; fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(dest), {recursive:true}); fs.copyFileSync(src, dest); console.log('Copied jar to public/downloads');"
